req.title: Inter-facility referral
req.statement: A clinician shall send a referral to another facility; the referral shall trigger a secure message and consent check.

telemetry.raw_response_head:
# Pytest Tests for Referral System Requirements

## Requirement Under Test
> A clinician shall send a referral to another facility; the referral shall trigger a secure message and consent check.

---

```python
"""
Test Suite: Referral to Another Facility
Requirement: A clinician shall send a referral to another facility;
             the referral shall trigger a secure message and consent check.

Coverage:
- Referral creation and submission
- Secure message triggering
- Consent check triggering
- Message security properties
- Consent check outcomes (granted, denied, pending)
- Failure and edge case handling
"""

import pytest
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Optional
from enum import Enum


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain Enums & Data Classes (replace with real imports in production)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

class ConsentStatus(Enum):
    GRANTED = "granted"
    DENIED = "denied"
    PENDING = "pending"
    NOT_FOUND = "not_found"


class MessageStatus(Enum):
    SENT = "sent"
    FAILED = "failed"
    QUEUED = "queued"


class ReferralStatus(Enum):
    SUBMITTED = "submitted"
    PENDING_CONSENT = "pending_consent"
    BLOCKED = "blocked"
    FAILED = "failed"


@dataclass
class Clinician:
    clinician_id: str
    name: str
    license_number: str
    facility_id: str


@dataclass
class Facility:
    facility_id: str
    name: str
    secure_messaging_endpoint: str


@dataclass
class Patient:
    patient_id: str
    name: str
    date_of_birth: str


@dataclass
class Referral:
    referral_id: str
    clinician: Clinician
    patient: Patient
    referring_facility: Facility
    receiving_facility: Facility
    reason: str
    priority: str = "routine"
    status: Optional[ReferralStatus] = None
    created_at: Optional[datetime] = None
    consent_status: Optional[ConsentStatus] = None
    message_status: Optional[MessageStatus] = None


@dataclass
class SecureMessage:
    message_id: str
    sender_facility_id: str
    receiver_facility_id: str
    referral_id: str
    payload: dict
    encrypted: bool = False
    signed: bool = False
    timestamp: Optional[datetime] = None


@dataclass
class ConsentRecord:
    consent_id: str
    patient_id: str
    requesting_facility_id: str
    receiving_facility_id: str
    status: ConsentStatus
    verified_at: Optional[datetime] = None


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Fixtures
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

@pytest.fixture
def clinician():
    return Clinician(
        clinician_id="CLIN-001",
        name="Dr. Jane Smith",
        license_number="MD-98765",
        facility_id="FAC-001",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def referring_facility():
    return Facility(
        facility_id="FAC-001",
        name="City General Hospital",
        secure_messaging_endpoint="https://city-general.example.com/messaging",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def receiving_facility():
    return Facility(
        facility_id="FAC-002",
        name="Regional Specialty Clinic",
        secure_messaging_endpoint="https://regional-specialty.example.com/messaging",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def patient():
    return Patient(
        patient_id="PAT-001",
        name="John Doe",
        date_of_birth="1980-05-15",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def valid_referral(clinician, patient, referring_facility, receiving_facility):
    return Referral(
        referral_id="REF-001",
        clinician=clinician,
        patient=patient,
        referring_facility=referring_facility,
        receiving_facility=receiving_facility,
        reason="Cardiology consultation for persistent chest pain",
        priority="urgent",
    )


@pytest.fixture
def mock_secure_messaging_service():
    service = MagicMock()
    servic
